activities.title: Send Text Frame
activities.description: WsStream.send(): serialize JSON to Message::Text, dispatch via tx_command MPSC channel, await oneshot result. Returns WsError on channel disconnect

activities.title: Receive Frames
activities.description: WsStream.next(): receive from rx_message unbounded channel. Pump task uses tokio::select to multiplex send commands and incoming messages. Forwards Text/Binary/Close/Frame messages

activities.title: Auto Reply Ping Pong
activities.description: Pump task intercepts Message::Ping, immediately sends Message::Pong with same payload. Message::Pong silently ignored. Keeps connection alive

activities.title: Detect Close Frame
activities.description: Message::Close forwarded to rx_message then pump breaks. Consumer sees Close as error: stream closed before response.completed

activities.title: Enforce Idle Timeout
activities.description: tokio::time::timeout wraps ws_stream.next() call. On timeout: return ApiError::Stream idle timeout. Configurable via provider.stream_idle_timeout
